Id.description: The unique identifier of the wishlist item

WishlistId.description: The ID of the wishlist this item belongs to

Name.description: The name of the wishlist item

Description.description: A description of the wishlist item

LinkSuggestion.description: A suggested link or URL for the item

Status.description: The current status of the wishlist item: e.g., 'Available', 'Acquired', 'Reserved'

Labels.description: Labels or tags associated with the wishlist item
